name: Solio_Roads_V2_WGS84
description: Solio road network v2 — traced from the printed reserve map, georeferenced, noded and simplified. source=manual_connector marks drawn bridge decks added by hand; status=unconfirmed_crossing marks edges over the 7 crossing places awaiting confirmation (see 4-joins-to-confirm.geojson in the fix-list pack).
